select.isEqual:
SELECT DOCID, DOCTITLE, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) STARTDATE, WRITERNAME$lang$, WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$, HASATTACHYN FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND STARTDATE < #lastDate# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($id$) AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND APRMEMBERSN <> 1
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))
ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC LIMIT #listSize#

SELECT DOCID, DOCTITLE, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) STARTDATE, WRITERNAME$lang$, WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$, HASATTACHYN FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND STARTDATE < #lastDate# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND DocState <> '017'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))
ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC LIMIT #listSize#

SELECT DOCID, DOCTITLE, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(STARTDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) STARTDATE, WRITERNAME$lang$, WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$, HASATTACHYN FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND STARTDATE < #lastDate# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND APRTYPE <> '015'
AND AprState != '001'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))
ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC LIMIT #listSize#

SELECT DISTINCT A.DOCID, A.DOCTITLE, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(A.ENDDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) STARTDATE, A.WRITERNAME$lang$, A.WRITERDEPTNAME$lang$, A.HASATTACHYN FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO C ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID
INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST E ON A.DOCSTATE = E.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST F ON A.FUNCTIONTYPE = F.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = F.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO G ON A.DOCID = G.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = G.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = G.COMPANYID
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND C.DELFLAG IS NULL AND A.ENDDATE < #lastDate# AND B.APRMEMBERID = #userId#
AND E.CODE1 ='SA02' AND F.CODE1 ='A04'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))
ORDER BY ENDDATE DESC LIMIT #listSize#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID IN ($id$) AND APRTYPE <> '015'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND DocState <> '017'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERSN = 1 AND APRMEMBERID = #userId# AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND DocState <> '017'
(DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.DOCID) FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO B ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_EXPENDAPRDOCINFO C ON A.DOCID = B.DOCID AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID
INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST E ON A.DOCSTATE = E.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = E.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = E.COMPANYID INNER JOIN TBL_CODELIST F ON A.FUNCTIONTYPE = F.CODE2 AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = F.COMPANYID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO G ON A.DOCID = G.DocID AND A.TENANT_ID = G.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = G.COMPANYID
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND C.DELFLAG IS NULL AND B.APRMEMBERID = #userId#
AND E.CODE1 ='SA02' AND F.CODE1 ='A04'
(A.DOCTITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%') OR A.WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchText#, '%'))

sqlMap.select: SELECT TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRSTATE, CASE WHEN (TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME$lang$ = '' OR TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME ELSE TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME$lang$ END APRMEMBERNAME, CASE WHEN (TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE ELSE TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$lang$ END APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, CASE WHEN (TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME ELSE TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$lang$ END APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(TBL_APRLINEINFO.RECEIVEDDATE,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) RECEIVEDDATE, CASE WHEN (TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME$lang$ = '' OR TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME ELSE TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERNAME$lang$ END PROXYUSERNAME, CASE WHEN (TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE ELSE TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERJOBTITLE$lang$ END PROXYUSERJOBTITLE, CASE WHEN (TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME ELSE TBL_EXPAPRLINE.PROXYUSERDEPTNAME$lang$ END PROXYUSERDEPTNAME, (SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID) APRMEMBERPHOTO FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRLINE ON TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.DOCID AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.APRMEMBERSN AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.TENANT_ID AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID = TBL_EXPAPRLINE.COMPANYID WHERE TBL_APRLINEINFO.DOCID = #docID# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY TBL_APRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERSN DESC
SELECT HREF FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID#

SELECT CONTENT, OPINIONGB, USERID, CASE WHEN (USERNAME$lang$ = '' OR USERNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN USERNAME ELSE USERNAME$lang$ END USERNAME, CASE WHEN (USERJOBTITLE$lang$ = '' OR USERJOBTITLE$lang$ IS NULL) THEN USERJOBTITLE ELSE USERJOBTITLE$lang$ END USERJOBTITLE, CASE WHEN (USERDEPTNAME$lang$ = '' OR USERDEPTNAME$lang$ IS NULL) THEN USERDEPTNAME ELSE USERDEPTNAME$lang$ END USERDEPTNAME FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID =#tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# ORDER BY OPINIONSN DESC

select.isNotEqual:
(SELECT DISPLAYNAME attachName, ATTACHFILEHREF attachHref, ATTACHFILESIZE attachFileSize FROM TBL_APRATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# ORDER BY ATTACHFILESN)
UNION ALL
(SELECT ATTACHDOCNAME attachName, ATTACHDOCURL attachHref, 0 attachFileSize FROM TBL_APRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# ORDER BY ATTACHSN)
select.isEqual:
(SELECT DISPLAYNAME attachName, ATTACHFILEHREF attachHref, ATTACHFILESIZE attachFileSize FROM TBL_ENDATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# ORDER BY ATTACHFILESN)
UNION ALL
(SELECT ATTACHDOCNAME attachName, ATTACHDOCURL attachHref, 0 attachFileSize FROM TBL_ENDAPRDOCATTACHINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# ORDER BY ATTACHSN)

sqlMap.select: SELECT EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND CN = #userId#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND cn = #userId# AND password = #password#

SELECT DOCID, ORGDOCID, FORMID, HREF, HASATTACHYN, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERDEPTID FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# LIMIT 1
SELECT DOCSTATE FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID# LIMIT 1
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_APROPINIONINFO ( DocID, UserID, OpinionGB, Content, UserName, UserName2, UserJobTitle, UserJobTitle2, UserDeptID, UserDeptName, UserDeptName2, OpinionSN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) SELECT #docID#, CN, #opinionGB#, #content#, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, TITLE, TITLE2, DEPARTMENT, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, (SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(OPINIONSN) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(OPINIONSN) + 1 END OPINIONSN FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID#), #tenantID#, #companyID# FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #userID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_APRDOCINFO SET HASOPINIONYN = #hasOpinionYN# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCID = #docID#
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 = #absenteeInfo# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND CN = #userId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_APROPINIONINFO WHERE DOCID = #docID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select:
(SELECT DOCTITLE as title, STARTDATE, '결재' as module, WRITERNAME FROM VAPRDOINGDOCLIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND APRMEMBERID IN (#userID#) AND APRTYPE <> '015' AND STARTDATE < #sessionDate#)
UNION
(SELECT A.TITLE, A.STARTDATE, '게시판' as module, WRITERNAME FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM A INNER JOIN ( SELECT BOARDID, BOARDNAME, BOARDNAME2, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_BOARD_MYBOARDS WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userID# ) B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = B.BOARDID INNER JOIN TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO P ON A.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID AND A.BOARDID = P.BOARDID AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND (A.APPRFLAG = 'Y' OR A.APPRFLAG IS NULL) AND A.STARTDATE < #sessionDate#)
UNION
(select title, startdate, '일정관리' as module, OWNERNAME as writername from tbl_schedule where ownerid in (#userID#) and tenant_id = #tenantID# and STARTDATE < #sessionDate# and STARTDATE > STR_TO_DATE(substring(now(), 1, 10),'%Y-%m-%d')) ORDER BY startdate desc LIMIT 20
